message:
fix(ws): use canonical WS_SUBSCRIPTION_DENIED code and add WS_CONNECTION_FAILED hint

Code review fixes for AI hints integration:
- Replace FORBIDDEN with canonical WS_SUBSCRIPTION_DENIED in handlers.ts
- Add WS_CONNECTION_FAILED to WS_ERROR_HINTS map
- Use createWSError in serializeServerMessage for consistency
- Remove unused FORBIDDEN from hints (non-canonical code)
